---
title: "Dashboard translation"
description: "Imagine breaking down language barriers and inviting a global audience into the conversation. In this session, I share a straightforward method to translate your dashboards."
author: "Flavio Matos"
date: "January 23, 2024"
categories: [Tableau]
event: "TUG Accessibility, Online"
image: cover_image.png
format: html
---

## About the event

During this session, presented at the [Accessibility TUG](https://usergroups.tableau.com/events/details/tableau-accessibility-tableau-user-group-presents-accessibility-tug-january-2024/) meetup, I share a straightforward method to translate your dashboards.

Why? It's never just about language – it's about broadening your audience. Break down communication barriers and let your data speak to people from diverse backgrounds and cultures.

## Recording

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8A_7Eiz1CFo >}}
